title: Anthropic 接近与黑石、高盛等达成 15 亿美元的合资协议
content: Anthropic 接近与黑石、高盛等达成 15 亿美元合资协议，Anthropic、黑石、海曼傅曼各投资约 3 亿美元。 Anthropic 接近与 黑石 、 高盛 等达成 15 亿美元合资协议，Anthropic、黑石、海曼傅曼各投资约 3 亿美元。 Anthropic 联合高盛黑石设立 15 亿美元人工智能项目，聚焦私募股权控股企业 新浪科技 2026-05-04 Anthropic 接近与黑石、高盛等达成 15 亿美元的合资协议 2026-04-11 黑石拟推动数据中心收购公司 IPO 拟筹资 20 亿美元 2026-04-07 Anthropic 拟投资 2 亿美元成立新私募股权合资企业 2026-02-12 Anthropic 接近完成超 200 亿美元融资，多家硅谷和华尔街机构或参投 2026-02-09 亚马逊对 Anthropic 投资获巨额账面回报 80 亿美元变 606 亿美元 2026-01-27 Zoom 对 Anthropic 的投资估值或达 20 亿至 40 亿美元 2026-01-18 Anthropic 拟筹资 250 亿美元 红杉资本将参与融资 2025-12-04 Anthropic 与 Snowflake 达成 2 亿美元协议，就 AI 智能体展开合作 2025-11-06 谷歌洽谈加大投资 Anthropic，后者估值或超 3500 亿美元 2025-09-03 Anthropic 完成新一轮融资，估值 1830 亿美元 查看更多 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍

summary: Anthropic is negotiating a $1.5 billion joint venture with Black Rock, Goldman Sachs, and other Wall Street firms. Each partner, including Anthropic and Hellman Friedman, is expected to contribute roughly $300 million. The venture aims to fund private‑equity‑backed companies and expand Anthropic’s AI capabilities. The partnership reflects the growing interest of financial institutions in AI-driven investment opportunities.

title: OpenAI and PwC collaborate to reimagine the office of the CFO
content: OpenAI and PwC are partnering to help enterprises use AI agents to automate finance workflows, improve forecasting, strengthen controls, and modernize the CFO function. Skip to main content li:hover)>li:not(:hover)>*]:text-primary-60 nav-desktop:pe-6 flex h-full min-w-0 items-baseline gap-0 overflow-x-hidden whitespace-nowrap [-ms-overflow-style:none] [scrollbar-width:none] focus-within:overflow-visible [&::-webkit-scrollbar]:hidden"> Research Products Business Developers Company Foundation (opens in a new window) Log in Try ChatGPT (opens in a new window) Research Products Business Developers Company Foundation (opens in a new window) Try ChatGPT (opens in a new window) Login OpenAI Table of contents Building agents around real finance workflows OpenAI as customer zero May 4, 2026 Finance teams sit at the center of how organizations plan, allocate capital, manage risk, and make decisions. To help them keep up with growing demands, PwC and OpenAI are collaborating to help enterprises reimagine the office of the CFO with AI agents that can automate workflows, coordinate across systems, surface risks and insights, and support better decisions with strong governance and human oversight. Together, PwC and OpenAI are building AI agents around the core operating rhythms of finance, from planning, forecasting, and reporting to procurement, payments, treasury, tax, and the accounting close. What sets this collaboration apart is its focus on building in the real world, not just designing in theory. For example, PwC and OpenAI are building a procurement agent inside the OpenAI financ

summary: OpenAI and PwC have teamed up to help companies use AI agents to automate finance tasks, enhance forecasting accuracy, tighten controls, and modernize the role of the CFO.

title: 马斯克寻求就 OpenAI 诉讼达成和解
content: 特斯拉 CEO 埃隆・马斯克在开庭前两天联系 OpenAI 联合创始人兼总裁格雷格・布罗克曼商讨和解，马斯克寻求领导层变更及 1500 亿美元损害赔偿，该诉讼涉及微软。 特斯拉 CEO 埃隆・马斯克 在开庭前两天联系 OpenAI 联合创始人兼总裁 格雷格・布罗克曼 商讨和解， 马斯克 寻求领导层变更及 1500 亿美元损害赔偿，该诉讼涉及 微软 。 马斯克开庭前主动联系 OpenAI 总裁 试探对方是否愿意达成和解 新浪科技 / 和讯网 2026-05-04 马斯克寻求就 OpenAI 诉讼达成和解 2026-04-29 马斯克称 OpenAI 是自己的创意 现任 CEO 奥尔特曼是「小偷」 2026-04-27 马斯克在针对 OpenAI 的 1800 亿美元诉讼中处于下风 2026-04-08 马斯克要求将诉讼赔偿金归还 OpenAI 旗下慈善机构 2026-04-08 马斯克起诉 OpenAI 案升级：要求罢免 CEO 奥特曼 2026-04-07 OpenAI 呼吁调查马斯克 称其行为阻碍 AGI 研发并涉嫌不正当竞争 2026-03-17 马斯克：若告赢 OpenAI，上千亿美元收益全部捐给慈善机构 2026-03-14 马斯克起诉 OpenAI 遭法官质疑：1340 亿美元索赔金「凭空捏造」 2026-02-28 ​马斯克出庭猛烈抨击 OpenAI：没人因为 Grok 自杀 2026-02-25 美国法官暂时驳回 xAI 对 OpenAI 提起的商业秘密诉讼 查看更多 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍

summary: Elon Musk contacted OpenAI co‑founder Greg Brockman two days before a court hearing to discuss a settlement in his lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft. He is seeking leadership changes and a $150 billion damages award, arguing that OpenAI stole his ideas. The lawsuit and its demands have attracted media coverage and criticism from OpenAI, which accuses Musk of obstructing AGI development.

title: Agent-guided workflows to accelerate model customization in Amazon SageMaker AI
content: Amazon SageMaker AI now offers an agentic experience that changes this. Developers describe their use case using natural language, and the AI coding agent streamlines the entire journey, from use case definition and data preparation through technique selection, evaluation, and deployment. In this post, we walk you through the model customization lifecycle using SageMaker AI agent skills. Artificial Intelligence Agent-guided workflows to accelerate model customization in Amazon SageMaker AI by Lauren Mullennex , Bobby Lindsey , Emily Moeng , Joshua Towner , Michael Diamond , Sandeep Raveesh-Babu , and Vineet Sharma on 04 MAY 2026 in Amazon SageMaker AI , Announcements , Artificial Intelligence , Intermediate (200) , Kiro , Technical How-to Permalink Comments Share Every organization has access to the same foundation models. The real competitive advantage comes from customizing them with your proprietary data and domain expertise. But getting there is complex, even for experienced teams. It requires mastering fine-tuning techniques like Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), and Reinforcement Learning Verifiable Rewards (RLVR), navigating fragmented APIs and model-specific data formats, designing rigorous evaluations, and managing months-long experiment cycles. Amazon SageMaker AI now offers an agentic experience that changes this. Developers describe their use case using natural language, and the AI coding agent streamlines the entire journey, from use case definition and data preparation through technique selection, evaluation, and deployment. P

title: Last Week in AI #340 - OpenAI vs Musk + Microsoft, DeepSeek v4, Vision Banana
content: First week of Musk v. Altman, OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal, DeepSeek previews new AI model that ‘closes the gap’ with frontier models, and more! 2 Share Musk testimony dominated first week of Musk v. Altman. ‘You can’t just steal a charity’ Related: All the evidence revealed so far in Musk v. Altman Musk texted OpenAI’s Brockman about settlement two days before trial began The Elon Musk v. Sam Altman trial is now on YouTube Elon Musk Seemingly Admits xAI Has Used OpenAI’s Models to Train Its Own Musk and Brockman’s settlement texts revealed as OpenAI trial enters second week
source: Last Week in AI - Last Week in AI
eventKey: last-week-340-openai-musk-microsoft
normalizedTitle: last week in ai 340 - openai vs musk microsoft deepseek v4 vision banana
representativeSources: Last Week in AI - Last Week in AI
scoreReasoning: AI周报汇总多个关键事件，时效性稍弱，但整理了Musk-OpenAI诉讼与微软合作变化等信号。
summary: The first week of the Musk‑vs‑Altman trial focused on Musk’s testimony, alleging OpenAI’s migration to a for‑profit model and claiming theft of the nonprofit mission. Musk admitted xAI partly used OpenAI’s models, while Brockman testified about an IPO and ownership stakes. Microsoft and OpenAI resolved a partnership dispute, shifting from exclusive to non‑exclusive licensing. DeepSeek released V4 models with large context windows, and DeepMind unveiled Vision Banana, a unified image‑generation and vision‑understanding model.

title: Introducing the agent quality loop: AgentCore Optimization now in preview
content: Generate recommendations from production traces, validate them with batch evaluation and A/B testing, and ship with confidence. AI agents that perform well at launch don’t stay that way. As models evolve, user behavior shifts, and prompts get reused in new contexts they were never designed for. Agent quality quietly degrades. In most teams, the improvement […] Artificial Intelligence Introducing the agent quality loop: AgentCore Optimization now in preview by Bharathi Srinivasan , Amandeep Khurana , and Nikhil Kandoi on 04 MAY 2026 in Amazon Bedrock AgentCore , Announcements , Foundational (100) , Launch Permalink Comments Share Generate recommendations from production traces, validate them with batch evaluation and A/B testing, and ship with confidence. AI agents that perform well at launch don’t stay that way. As models evolve, user behavior shifts, and prompts get reused in new contexts they were never designed for. Agent quality quietly degrades. In most teams, the improvement process still looks the same: without automatic feedback loops, when a user complains, a developer reads through traces, forms a hypothesis, rewrites the prompt, tests a handful of cases, and ships the fix. Then the cycle repeats, often introducing a new issue for a different user. Up until today, Amazon Bedrock AgentCore provided the pieces for you to debug it manually or build custom implementations: check the evaluation scores to detect quality drop, deep dive into the traces to determine the root cause and update the agent with an improved configuration. The developer is the performance engine
eventKey: introducing-agent-quality-loop-agentcore-optimization
normalizedTitle: introducing the agent quality loop agentcore optimization now in preview
scoreReasoning: 具体AI Agent优化工具更新，属于开发者/工程效率跃迁信号，影响有限。
summary: Generate recommendations from production traces, validate them with batch evaluation and A/B testing, and ship with confidence. AI agents…

summary: LearningCircuit’s local-deep-research repository develops a Python framework that delivers high accuracy (≈95 %) on SimpleQA using local and cloud LLMs such as Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090. It supports multiple LLM interfaces (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, etc.) and integrates more than ten search engines, including arXiv, PubMed, and private document sources. Everything runs locally and is encrypted, with 4,876 stars and 460 forks on GitHub.

title: 大型挂机现场：马斯克的55万英伟达GPU，利用率才11%
content: Elon Musk’s xAI operates about 550,000 NVIDIA GPUs but only uses roughly 11% of them. The low utilization stems from coordination challenges, memory bandwidth limits, network latency, and intermittent training workloads. Larger clusters suffer idle time that worsens efficiency. While other firms like Meta and Google reach 43–46% usage, xAI is working to raise its rate to 50% through infrastructure and software stack improvements. The case highlights that buying GPUs is just the first step; effective usage is the true challenge in AI.
eventKey: 大型挂机现场-马斯克的55万英伟达gpu-利用率才11

title: 英伟达黄仁勋痛批 Anthropic CEO，呼吁 AI 行业领袖慎言慎行、以事实为据
content: 英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋在播客节目表示，行业领袖谈论 AI 重要性时应「慎言慎行」。他反驳 Anthropic CEO 达里奥・阿莫迪关于「AI 未来几年可能取代 50% 入门白领」的言论，认为领袖应以事实为论据讨论。他还批评 AI 可能毁灭世界的说法，这番言辞或回应马斯克曾称人类有 20% 的概率被 AI 毁灭。目前 AI 虽已渗透各经济层面，但对劳动力和人类的长远影响无法估量，支持者和反对者看法不一。 英伟达黄仁勋痛批 Anthropic 阿莫迪，呼吁 AI 行业领袖慎言慎行、以事实为据 前天 英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋 在播客节目表示，行业领袖谈论 AI 重要性时应「慎言慎行」。他反驳 Anthropic CEO 达里奥・阿莫迪关于「AI 未来几年可能取代 50% 入门白领」的言论，认为领袖应以事实为论据讨论。他还批评 AI 可能毁灭世界的说法，这番言辞或回应 马斯克 曾称人类有 20% 的概率被 AI 毁灭。目前 AI 虽已渗透各经济层面，但对劳动力和人类的长远影响无法估量，支持者和反对者看法不一。 英伟达黄仁勋痛批 Anthropic 阿莫迪，呼吁 AI 行业领袖慎言慎行、以事实为据 金融界 / IT 之家 黄仁勋点名 Anthropic 达里奥，别一当 CEO，就开「上帝视角」 机器之心 2026-04-14 英伟达推出全球首个开源量子人工智能模型「ISING」 2026-03-17 英伟达 Vera Rubin 开启「智能体 AI」新前沿 2026-03-12 英伟达推出新模型 Nemotron 3 Super，主打支持代理人工智能应用 2026-03-11 英伟达将推出 NemoClaw 开源智能体平台 帮助企业部署可以执行任务的 AI 智能体 2026-03-10 英伟达将推出面向 AI 智能体的开源平台 2026-03-07 英伟达黄仁勋：未来没有「笨」软件，AI 智能体将全面接管 2026-03-05 英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋：将投资 300 亿美元于 OpenAI 1000 亿美元不在考虑之中 2026-02-21 英伟达接近向 OpenAI 投资 300 亿美元 2026-02-08 英伟达内部全面部署 AI 编码工具 工程师代码产出量提升三倍 2026-02-07 黄仁勋称 AI 资本支出适当且可持续 英伟达股价结束连跌并大幅上涨 查看更多 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍

scoreReasoning: 行业领袖观点交锋，属舆论信号，对实际决策影响有限，需与其他信号结合。
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang criticized Anthropic CEO Daniel Amodei in a podcast, arguing that AI leaders should speak cautiously and base claims on facts. Huang disputed Amodei’s assertion that AI could replace 50 % of entry-level white‑collar jobs in the next few years and dismissed dramatic warnings that AI could destroy humanity, calling them irresponsible. He urged the industry to avoid “god‑like” rhetoric and to focus on realistic, evidence‑based discussions about AI’s economic and societal impact.

content: 2026-05-05 Hacker News Top Stories # 作者在健身房主动与35位陌生人交谈，一个月记录显示真诚与勇气能带来真实连接，适度且不功利的赞美与关心有效但过度会适得其反。 deepclaude 将 Claude Code 代理无缝切换到 DeepSeek 等更低价后端以显著降本并保留多工具循环能力，但受限于图像/并行支持且需权衡不同供应商的数据训练政策与隐私风险。 GameStop 提出以555亿美元收购 eBay 的激进要约引发对协同与融资可行性的质疑，市场分化反应且其盈利质量与长期增长模式被认为依赖利息和削减成本难以为继。 Spirit 航空停运后有人发起“Spirit 2.0”合作社众筹收购倡议以实现员工与社区所有、透明治理和低票价，但讨论指出航空业利润多靠信用卡与忠诚计划而非飞行本身。 欧盟自2027年起要求手机配备可用常规工具更换的电池并至少供货5年，虽或影响机身与防水但可通过设计化解，且对容量保持率达阈值者与特定设备有豁免。 伦敦现疑似班克斯新雕像：一名被国旗蒙眼的西装男正走向悬崖边，讽喻对民族主义的盲目追随与自毁。 BYOMesh 宣称在网状回传上带宽提升百倍并结合亚GHz与2.4GHz LoRa，但实际增益受法规合规、占空比与距离权衡所限，更适合低带宽遥测与消息场景。 作者警示智能代理编程虽提效却易引入复杂性、锁定与技能退化，应以理解与简洁为先、谨慎而有边界地使用而非盲目依赖。 GitHub 多项服务短暂异常后已恢复，社区将成因指向代理编程带来的使用激增与基础设施压力，并预测可能的限额/价格调整与部分用户转向自建。 1. 在健身房与陌生人交谈 (Talking to strangers at the gym) # https://thienantran.com/talking-to-35-strangers-at-the-gym/ 这篇文章讲述了作者 Thienan Tran 为了克服孤独感，尝试在健身房与陌生人交朋友的经历。作者毕业后虽然找到工作，但缺乏朋友，尝试通过健身这一常去的场所来社交。尽管担心打扰别人或陷入尴尬，作者决定每天主动与一位健身房常见的人搭话，起初使用固定的开场白“你在这里很常见，你力量很大，你的训练计划是什么？”，后来根据对方特点调整话题。 文章详细记录了作者一个月内与不同人的交流情况，包括对方的身份描述、对话时长、交流内容以及后续关系发展。例如，有的人成为偶尔打招呼的朋友，有的则因为搬走或不常见面而断了联系。作者还分享了自己因害怕社交而产生的行为，如不敢唤醒室友、假装不认识熟人等，表达了主动社交的困难与勇气。 整体来看，文章通过真实的社交实验，展示了孤独感的挑战和建立人际关系的努力，强调了主动迈出第一步的重要性，以及社交过程中可能遇到的各种反应和结果。 HN 热度 1083 points | 评论 515 comments | 作者：thitran | 13 hours ago # https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48007438 真诚地赞美别人而不带任何目的，可以带来纯粹的快乐和满足感。 《人性的优点》这本书并非教人操控他人，而是强调真诚、善意和对他人兴趣的重要性。 人们能感受到你是否真心关心他们，真诚的关心会带来积极的互动和结果。 有些人误用书中的技巧进行操控或销售，导致别人对这些行为产生警惕和反感。 适度使用对方名字和赞美可以增进关系，但过度或刻意使用会让人感到不适。 书中部分内容因时代变迁显得过时，尤其是关于家庭和性别角色的章节。 记住并使用别人的名字能显著改善人际关系，即使对有注意力障碍的人也有效。 介绍名字的时机很重要，稍晚介绍名字并结合其他信息更容易让人记住。 2. DeepClaude——结合 DeepSeek V4 P

summary: A Hacker News post sums up several tech and business stories: gym strangers show that genuine praise builds real ties; DeepClaude cuts Claude Code costs by switching to cheaper backends; GameStop’s $55.5 B offer for eBay faces skepticism; Spirit Airlines proposes a community‑owned “Spirit 2.0” model; the EU will mandate removable phone batteries from 2027; a new Banksy‑attributed statue in London criticizes blind nationalism; BYOMesh advertises a 100× LoRa bandwidth boost; a cautionary note warns that agent‑based coding can increase complexity and lock‑in; and GitHub’s outage highlights higher demand from AI coding tools.
